sloka_1024.meaning: O Jagannāth, Lord of the universe

sloka_1026.meaning: O Lord of yogamāyā, Lord of divine potency

sloka_1042.meaning: I alone am the eternal time flow

sloka_1030.meaning: I am the Āditya known as Viṣṇu
(I am) the Vāyu known as Marīchi

sloka_1044.meaning: I am the month Agrahāyaṇ, the month of harvest (mid-November to mid-December)
(I am) the mantra prayer to Lord Indra
Of all the mantras in the Sāma-veda

sloka_1018.meaning: I am the Supreme Absolute Truth, Svayam Bhagavān or the original Supreme Lord, the cause
in their divine relationship of servitude, friendship, etc
All activity in the universe of matter and spirit, and the Vedas and allied scriptures
of all causes, including Brahma, Paramātmā, and Bhagavān

sloka_1029.meaning: situated within the heart of all beings

sloka_1014.meaning: and the Supreme Lord of all beings
from all sins or obstacles to devotion

sloka_1021.meaning: with the shining lamp of knowledge

sloka_1036.meaning: who was born of the churning of nectar

sloka_1043.meaning: of the predestined six transformations of the living beings
forgiveness (or the seven wives of Dharma)

sloka_1019.meaning: enlightening one another with the nectar of their devotional realisations
Those who have dedicated their lives to Me

sloka_1022.meaning: are now declaring this to me
Nārad Muni, the saint among the gods
as the Supreme Brahma, directly the Supreme Lord
the supreme Śyāmasundar form, the supreme refuge
the all-pervading Lord, the fountain-head of all opulences

sloka_1015.meaning: ability to discriminate between spirit and matter
equanimity, seeing the happiness and unhappiness of all beings as one’s own
austerity as directed in the Vedas

sloka_1016.meaning: the four sages Sanaka, Sanandana, Sanat Kumār, and Sanātan, all known as brahmarṣis
are born of My mind, which is manifest as Hiraṇyagarbha, Lord Brahmā
and the fourteen Manus headed by Svayambhuva

sloka_1028.meaning: to the expanse of My glories

sloka_1034.meaning: sacrifice in the form of meditative chanting of the holy names

sloka_1040.meaning: Of sanctifiers or of the rapid

sloka_1013.meaning: and of the great sages, too

sloka_1023.meaning: neither the demigods nor the demons

sloka_1012.meaning: to you, who are very dear to Me

sloka_1037.meaning: the thunderbolt, the weapon of Lord Indra
(I am) Vāsuki, the king of snakes

sloka_1027.meaning: the process of devotional union with You (bhakti-yoga)
